info.title: Meta Cloud API Layer
info.description: Pilot Status API Layer — Meta Cloud API (WhatsApp Cloud API / Graph API passthrough). Base URL `https://pilotstatus.com.br/api/layer/meta`. Call Graph API nodes exactly as on `graph.facebook.com/<version>/` — Pilot swaps your `ps_` key for the number's real Meta system token. The `vNN.N` version prefix is optional (defaults to v22.0). Account/business/auth management and number (de)registration are blocked.

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: Your Pilot Status API key (ps_...). You may also send `Authorization: Bearer ps_...` or `?access_token=ps_...`.

post.description: Send any WhatsApp Cloud API message. `type` selects the kind: text, image, audio, video, document, sticker, location, contacts, interactive, template, reaction.

error.message: (#131030) Recipient phone number not in allowed list

parameters.name: phoneNumberId
parameters.description: Meta phone-number id of the number linked to your API key.

type.description: Message kind — selects which object below to fill.

filename.description: File name shown to the recipient.

action.description: Buttons / sections / parameters for the interactive type.

emoji.description: Emoji, or empty string to remove.

post.description: Send a read receipt or a typing indicator for an inbound message.

error.message: (#131030) Recipient phone number not in allowed list

parameters.name: phoneNumberId
parameters.description: Meta phone-number id of the number linked to your API key.

post.description: Upload a media file (multipart/form-data). Returns a media id to use in a message.

error.message: (#131030) Recipient phone number not in allowed list

parameters.name: phoneNumberId
parameters.description: Meta phone-number id of the number linked to your API key.

post.description: Start a resumable upload session (query: `file_length`, `file_type`). Returns an upload id; send the bytes with `POST /{id}`.

error.message: (#131030) Recipient phone number not in allowed list

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: Meta App id (resumable upload session).

get.description: Fetch a Graph node by id: media id → signed media URL + metadata (url rewritten to a Pilot download URL); group id → group info; phone-number id → number info; template id → template details.

url.description: Signed download URL (rewritten to a Pilot URL).

schema.description: Media metadata (when id is a media id). Group / phone-number / template ids return their own node shape.

error.message: (#131030) Recipient phone number not in allowed list

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A Graph node id — its meaning depends on the operation (see the description).

post.description: Template id → edit an approved template's components; upload-session id → append file bytes (raw binary, header `file_offset`).

error.message: (#131030) Recipient phone number not in allowed list

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A Graph node id — its meaning depends on the operation (see the description).

components.description: Template components to replace (when id is a template id).

schema.description: Template-update body. For an upload-session id, send the raw file bytes instead (binary, header `file_offset`).

delete.description: Media id → delete an uploaded media asset; group id → leave/close a group. Deleting your own WABA or phone-number id is blocked (403).

error.message: (#131030) Recipient phone number not in allowed list

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A Graph node id — its meaning depends on the operation (see the description).
